name: typescript
description: TypeScript language power pack — import graph analysis, type safety checks, and TS-specific reasoning
rules: Analyze import graphs for circular dependencies
Check for proper type narrowing and type guards
Enforce strict null checks in critical paths

checks.description: Detect circular import dependencies in the TypeScript module graph
Flag excessive use of 'any' type which weakens type safety
Detect unsafe type assertions using 'as any'
Check for exported functions missing explicit return types
Verify strict null check handling in critical paths
